Services / Monthly Retainer
Monthly Retainer

Claude that keeps getting
better every month.

Your business changes. Your Claude implementation should too. The retainer keeps everything current, adds new workflows as you grow, and gives you a partner to think through what comes next.

Start the conversation → All services

Starting at $1,200/mo · Month-to-month · Cancel anytime

What You Get Each Month

Five things, every month.

01
New Workflow Build

Each month we build at least one new Claude workflow for your business — a new use case, a new department, or a new tool integration.

02
Prompt Optimization

Existing prompts tuned based on what you've learned using them. Edge cases handled. Output quality improved. Your library gets better every month.

03
Monthly Strategy Call

A 45-minute call to review what's working, what to build next, and how to think about AI as your business evolves.

04
Async Support

Questions answered via Slack or email, typically same day. Use us as a resource whenever you hit something you can't figure out.

05
Priority Response Time

Retainer clients move to the front of the queue. New workflow requests are scoped and started within the same week.

Is This Right for You?

The retainer is right for you if…

You've already implemented Claude and want to keep going

You have working workflows and want to expand them, add new use cases, and keep your implementation ahead of your business growth.

You want a dedicated AI partner, not just a vendor

You're making AI decisions every month and want someone who knows your business deeply to think through them with you.

Your prompts need tuning and you don't have time to do it

You know the outputs could be better, but optimizing prompts isn't how you want to spend your time.

You want support when you need it, not just when you schedule it

Async access means when you hit something confusing or want a second opinion, you can ask without waiting for the next call.

What This Isn't

Let's be direct.

×
Not a coaching program

We're not teaching you how to use AI — we're using it for you. Every month you get built deliverables, not lessons about building them.

×
Not a software subscription

You're paying for expert time and custom work, not a SaaS tool. Everything built is yours, documented, and works independently of us.

×
Not a long-term commitment

Month-to-month means you can cancel anytime. We'd rather earn your retention every month than lock you into a contract.

Pricing

Two tiers. No surprises.

Core
$1,200/mo

For small teams with an established implementation who want steady progress and support.

  • ✓ 1 new workflow/month
  • ✓ Prompt optimization
  • ✓ Monthly strategy call (45 min)
  • ✓ Async support (email)
Get started
Most Popular
Growth
$2,000/mo

For growing teams who want more workflows, faster execution, and deeper strategic involvement.

  • ✓ 2–3 new workflows/month
  • ✓ Deep prompt optimization
  • ✓ Monthly strategy call (60 min)
  • ✓ Async support (Slack + email)
  • ✓ Priority same-week start on requests
Get started
How to Get Started

Three steps.

1
Fill out the form below

Tell us where you are with Claude right now and what you want to accomplish. Takes 2 minutes.

2
Discovery call (30 min)

We confirm the right tier, agree on month-one priorities, and set up shared communication channels.

3
Month one begins

We start building immediately. By end of week one you'll have your first deliverable underway.

Get Started

Start the conversation.

Tell us where you are with Claude and we'll schedule a quick call to figure out the right tier and month-one focus.

We got it — thanks!

We'll reach out within one business day to schedule a quick discovery call.
